text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: At the "Arima Kinen", T.M. Opera O had no chance of winning. Trapped within a pack where not a single ray of light could shine through, she, however—

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text:
She made that unforgettable run. Threading through the pack, she seized an unprecedented victory. She would later say— 
"If there is no precedent, I'll just create one"

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: During an interview, Grass Wonder shared her thoughts with us. "I reeled in that Arima victory. With my feelings" — That's what led to that result.

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: It was a narrow victory. Yet, without using the legends forged by past Arima winners as a model—the result of her pursuing her own personal best was what led her to that summit.

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: Speed Symboli. The horsegirl who achieved the first-ever triple crown of Grand Prix victories in history. Regarding her final run, she speaks thus—"In the end, it's all about guts"

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: A victory by a neck over second place. It wasn't about repeating the previous year's Arima. Her final run was a mission to surpass her own legendary achievements—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer… Trainer! That was just— 
that was truly amazing, right…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, seriously… From my perspective, I always viewed them as being so composed… Like they won simply because it was their destiny to win. That's how I always saw it, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: But… yeah, you're right. Watching the footage again… they were simply giving it their absolute all. At the core, there was this gritty determination—this raw tenacity and guts—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I see… The ones who can truly make history are those who… in the middle of a battle crowded with fierce rivals, still managed to seize victory through their "feelings"

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …There wasn't a single person. Not one person who established history just by "tracing" the past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I don't think there's anything wrong with learning from the past. However, in order to achieve something great… you probably have to bring your raw, true self onto the stage—
choice_data_list: <size=40>Because you're the one running out there</size>
<size=40>Because you're the one running out there</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………Me. 
Chrono Genesis, on the stage…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the day of the Tracen Academy Open Day arrived. And Chrono Genesis was—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hah, hah, hah, hah——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (2200 meters on the turf. The track is soft because of yesterday's rain. Situationally, this is very similar to the "Takarazuka Kinen" where Nakayama claimed victory—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Outer mid-pack… the position Nakayama was in. 
But in Orfe's case, it was a little more…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …! I'm doing it again, overthinking…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Can I really produce that same explosive speed of a 34.7 closing time? If I can't, then I shouldn't just be tracing the past)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: After all, the one running today is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: …It felt as if her performance was finally transforming into exactly what I had hoped for. After all, what really captivated me back during the mock race was…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…I can hear the Trainer's voice. 
They're cheering for me. — For me, and no one else)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. The one running here today— 
isn't those girls who have woven history together)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It's me, who is still a nobody.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Then, I'll just use history as a "rough" guide. Once I grasp the general idea, everything after that is—!)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Whoa! With 200 meters to go, Chrono Genesis has launched her final charge! An incredible burst of speed! Will she reach them?! Will she make it?!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I spent my whole life chasing the shadow of history. I wanted to reach it… I wanted to be a part of it so badly)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (But, I was wrong. That's not how you become a maker of history. If I truly want to carve out my own legacy, as myself—)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I must win… I want to win. I really want to win! To reach the horsegirls who created history! To stand among the legends who achieved greatness!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (And then… next time, it'll be me—)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Chrono Genesis, she crosses the line in first! A victory by 
a solid two lengths! She's proven her true potential today!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Way to go, Chrono Genesis!! 
What a great race!!

text_block_list.name: Specator B
text_block_list.text:
I was moved! When is your debut?! 
I'm looking forward to it!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…………Looking forward to my debut… 
Does that mean…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Does that mean… they want to follow my history? 
They really feel that way…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —…Ah, so that's it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: So this is how… I'm supposed to paint the picture….

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I'm back.
choice_data_list: <size=33>That was a perfect race. I can't wait for the next one!</size>
<size=33>That was a perfect race. I can't wait for the next one!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah, thank you so much. 
But, well…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The reason I was finally able to run like that was…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…………I wonder, is this the same feeling they had? 
All those girls,  too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…It's scary to say it out loud. 
But I have to take that step properly)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Because, for me… it has to be this person)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Um… Trainer… 
If it's alright with you…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…No. I truly want to ask this of you…! 
Please, with me—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Will you make history with me?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 『The many true stories that make my heart race with every turn of the page. Beyond them, someday—I will, too』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: 『I want to create a new history』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
『This is the story of my——our, 
challenge. (Writer C)』
